reviews.review_msg: Considering how the course I took with Natasha was a non-academic one, I am aware that her academic courses could have different experiences. However, as an ILS teacher, she does great – her lectures are very clear, she actively engages with her students, and shows understanding care towards those in need.

If you are FIC students, you might have chance to take her ILS and that is your opportunity! ILS is required course for you and her ILS is always fun, but still focused on ILS academic materials. You better be fast to get her class.
